src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Expand the Progress functional interface to a full interface with default methods for lifecycle events (start, finish, error, line) instead of just progress updates.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Removed `@FunctionalInterface` and `void progress(...)`; added `default void onStart`, `onFinish`, `onError`, `onLine`, and `onProgress`.

src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.general_idea: Update the progress parsing logic to call the new interface methods and handle non-progress lines.
src/main/java/top/itning/yunshu/yunshuna.human_impl: Changed `progress.progress(...)` to `progress.onProgress(...)` and added `progress.onLine(line)` calls in process callbacks.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 2.3.1.RELEASE to align with Java 11 support and modern framework features.
Update the Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 11.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Migrate the real-time progress update mechanism from Server-Sent Events (EventSource) to WebSocket for bidirectional communication.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl: Replaced `new EventSource("progress")` with `new WebSocket("ws://" + window.location.host + "/p")` and updated message handling callbacks.
